title: T-007 — scanner logout + GET /session sliding refresh (06-a)
prompt:
# T-007 — scanner logout + GET /session

PRD: 06-SCANNER-P1-PRD.md §8.1 FR-SC-BE-002/003, §12.1 sliding refresh, §6 D7 kiosk vs personal
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Implement idempotent logout and a session-validation endpoint with sliding refresh (issue new token if exp-now<60s) and per-mode idle timeout (300s personal / 60s kiosk).

## Implementation contract
1. `apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/logout/route.ts` (POST): mark scanner_sessions.ended_at=now(), clear refresh cookie, write audit row. Idempotent (returns 200 even if already ended).
2. `apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/session/route.ts` (GET): verify JWT + DB session, sliding refresh when (exp-now)<60s, return `{ valid, expires_at, user, context: { site_id, line_id, shift_id } }`. Enforce idle timeout: if now - last_activity_at > scanner_idle_timeout(mode) ⇒ 401 SC_SESSION_EXPIRED + ended_at update.
3. Service additions in `scanner-auth.ts`.

## Files
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/logout/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/app/api/scanner/session/route.ts [create]
- apps/scanner/src/server/services/scanner-auth.ts [modify]
- apps/scanner/__tests__/api/scanner-session.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an active session, when POST /api/scanner/logout runs twice, then both calls return 200 and scanner_sessions.ended_at is set exactly once
2. Given a JWT with exp 30 seconds in the future, when GET /api/scanner/session runs, then the response sets a new session_token with extended exp and updates last_activity_at
3. Given a kiosk-mode session idle for 70 seconds, when GET /api/scanner/session runs, then it returns 401 SC_SESSION_EXPIRED and scanner_sessions.ended_at is set

## Test strategy
- RED: write scanner-session.test.ts asserting idempotent logout, sliding refresh, and kiosk idle expiry before implementation
- Run 'pnpm --filter scanner test api/scanner-session'

## Risk red lines
- Do not refresh sessions whose ended_at is already set
- Do not skip the cookie clear on logout
- Do not allow personal idle policy to apply to a kiosk session

pipeline_inputs.description: Idempotent logout + session validate endpoint with sliding refresh and per-mode idle timeout enforcement.
pipeline_inputs.details: Two route handlers backed by scanner-auth service. Logout sets ended_at + clears refresh cookie idempotently. Session endpoint validates JWT, checks scanner_sessions row, enforces idle timeout per device_mode, slides exp when within 60s, and returns context. Tests cover idempotent logout, sliding refresh, and kiosk idle 60s expiry.

Do not implement context-set endpoint here (T-009)
Do not implement client-side timeout modal here (T-025)
